author: Siliconera
text:
Last Volume of Jujutsu Kaisen Manga Appears in English

Jujutsu Kaisen volume 30, the final volume of the manga, is now out in English, as are five variant covers of the last entry.

The post Last Volume of Jujutsu Kaisen Manga Appears in English appeared first on Siliconera.

text:

text:
Sega GaaS, Online Super Game Canceled

Sega announced its planned Super Game online, games as a service title is now canceled, following it being in development since 2022.

The post Sega GaaS, Online Super Game Canceled appeared first on Siliconera.

text:

text:

The post Animate Will Sell Sega Games Merchandise Worldwide in 2026 appeared first on Siliconera.

text:

text:
Nintendo Faced a Bomb Threat in Japan

The perpetrator who sent the message has been arrested, but the police did not find anything suspicious around the Kyoto headquarters.
